message:
feat(planner,core): wire PLANNER-3 join-order reshape into streaming hash-join path (bd-a1e52)

Completes the PLANNER-3 work: when sqlite_stat1 hints produce a
non-identity permutation for inner equi-joins, all 5 parallel
structures (table_sources, all_sources, col_map/col_collations,
table_rows, join_plans) are now rebuilt in the permuted order.
ON constraints are greedy-matched via try_extract_equi_join_indices;
infeasible permutations (disconnected join graph) bail to source order.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
